mnemonics: Multilayer Perceptron Affects Neural Computing (MAPANC) for 4.2,
Gradient Descent Helps to Make the Problem of Learning (4.3) work
keyPoints: Regression and Classification are types of Supervised Learning
Neural Networks are used for both Regression and Classification
Backpropagation is an algorithm used for Training Neural Networks (4.4)
Activation Functions such as Sigmoid and ReLU are used in Neural Networks
Regularization Techniques such as L1 and L2 are used to prevent Overfitting (4.5)
Decision Trees are a subset of Supervised Learning Algorithms (5.1)
Random Forest is an Ensemble Learning Algorithm (5.2)
Support Vector Machines (SVM) are used for Classification (5.3)
Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is used for Dimensionality Reduction (5.5)
K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) is a simple Supervised Learning Algorithm (5.6)
Nearest Mean (NM) is used for Unsupervised Learning (5.7)
Data Preprocessing is an essential step in Machine Learning (6.1)
Overfitting occurs when a model is too complex and fits the noise (6.2)
